headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 12, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks fell short in a close game against the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense. The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge. The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a thrilling 4-3 win, with Braxton Ashcraft leading the Pirates' pitching effort.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. Tyler O'Neill (Baltimore Orioles) has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion. Hunter Harvey (Chicago Cubs) has been placed on the 15-day injured list with right triceps inflammation. George Springer (Toronto Blue Jays) has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left great toe fracture. Adley Rutschman (Baltimore Orioles) has been placed on the 10-day injured list with left ankle inflammation.

There have been several trades and roster movements across the league. The Philadelphia Phillies acquired Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals traded Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for Brayden Smith. The Atlanta Braves acquired Victor Mederos from the Los Angeles Angels for future considerations.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Philly**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks lost to the Philadelphia Phillies 3-4 in a close game. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Marlins 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate. Greene's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Pirates Pull Off Thrilling 4-3 Win Over Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close matchup, securing a 4-3 victory. Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates' pitching effort with 5.0 innings pitched, 9 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Joe Ryan earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trevor Larnach led the Twins' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Baltimore**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 6-2 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, marking their defeat in the matchup. Casey Schmitt and Taylor Ward were among the impact hitters for their respective teams.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Corbin Carroll and Jose Fernandez contributing key hits in the final game.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on 7-Day IL with Concussion**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list retroactive to April 9, 2026, due to a concussion.

top_news.title: **Phillies Acquire Steward Berroa in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash.
